name: Hospital El Cruce
message: Hospital El Cruce has 130 beds and offers a wide range of medical services, such as advanced diagnostic tests and highly specialized surgical procedures. Hospital El Cruce corporate office is located in 5401 Av. Calchaqui, Florencio Varela, Buenos Aires, 1888, Argentina and has 116 employees. The total amount of data leakage is 761.60 GB
